summary: iOS | OSPREY | Popup about update for Charge Case appears after launching the app
scenario: Charge Case update popup appears briefly for Free 60+ after app launch, even though it should not appear since the case can be updated via the app.
description_clean: Popup about update for Charge Case appears briefly after launching the app. Steps: Pair Free 60+ with the app, ensure Charge Case is on outdated firmware, restart the app. Observed: Popup informing user about update for Charge Case appears for a split second after launching. Expected: This popup should not appear for Free 60+ charge case since it can be updated via the mobile app.
steps: Ensure Charge Case is on outdated firmware
expected: The popup about updating the Charge Case should not appear for Free 60+ charge case since it can be updated via the mobile app.
actual: Popup informing user about update for Charge Case appears for a split second after launching the app.
